full_descent.title: Reach Y:-50 or below while keeping Sculk Sickness in check and Pressure managed

subtitle.text: Y:-50. The bedrock layer replaced by deepslate. You are all the way down.

description: The world below Y:0 is deepslate.
Below Y:-40 is the territory of the Ancient City and ancient things.
The abyssal age is not just an age unlock.
It is a proof of competence — that you can manage all three
at the same time, at the bottom of the world.
Y:-50 is where diamond veins are most concentrated.
It is also where you are furthest from anything safe.
Both of these facts are equally true.
→ Reach Y:-50 with Pressure and Sculk managed [check]
→ Collect 128 Deepslate (for future building and crafting)
→ Collect 3 more Echo Shards from deep city loot
